<!--
  Thanks for the PR! A few things to make review fast:

  - Link the issue (`Closes #123`) or a discussion if there is one.
  - Keep changes focused — split into multiple PRs if they're independent.
  - Update docs (`docs/`, JSDoc, examples) when the public API moves.
  - All checks must pass: `pnpm build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm lint`.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat: new functionality
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] docs: documentation only
- [ ] refactor: no behaviour change
- [ ] perf: performance improvement
- [ ] test: added or updated tests
- [ ] chore: build, deps, tooling

## Related issue

Closes #

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify the change? Commands run, scenarios covered. -->

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] Manually verified the new behaviour with `…`

## Breaking changes
